en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO LILIES. A MASKIL OF THE SONS OF KORAH; A LOVE SONG. My heart overflows with a pleasing theme; I address my verses to the king; my tongue is like the pen of a ready scribe.
zh: 我心裡湧出優美的言辭； 我要為王朗誦我的作品； 我的舌頭像經驗豐富的作家的筆。

en: You are the most handsome of the sons of men; grace is poured upon your lips; therefore God has blessed you forever.
zh: 你比世人都美好； 你的嘴唇吐出恩言； 因此， 神賜福給你，直到永遠。

en: Gird your sword on your thigh, O mighty one, in your splendor and majesty!
zh: 大能者啊！願你腰間佩上刀， 彰顯你的尊榮和威嚴。

en: In your majesty ride out victoriously for the cause of truth and meekness and righteousness; let your right hand teach you awesome deeds!
zh: 在你的威嚴中，為了真理、謙卑和公義的緣故， 你勝利地乘車前進； 願你的右手施行可畏的事。

en: Your arrows are sharp in the heart of the king's enemies; the peoples fall under you.
zh: 你的箭銳利， 射中了王的仇敵的心； 萬民都仆倒在你腳下。

en: Your throne, O God, is forever and ever. The scepter of your kingdom is a scepter of uprightness;
zh: 神啊！你的寶座是永永遠遠的， 你國的權杖是公平的權杖。

en: you have loved righteousness and hated wickedness. Therefore God, your God, has anointed you with the oil of gladness beyond your companions;
zh: 你喜愛公義，恨惡邪惡， 所以， 神，就是你的 神， 用喜樂的油膏抹你，勝過膏抹你的同伴。

en: your robes are all fragrant with myrrh and aloes and cassia. From ivory palaces stringed instruments make you glad;
zh: 你的衣服都有沒藥、沉香和肉桂的香氣； 從象牙宮裡有絲弦的樂聲，使你歡喜。

en: daughters of kings are among your ladies of honor; at your right hand stands the queen in gold of Ophir.
zh: 你的貴妃中有眾君王的女兒； 王后佩戴著俄斐的金飾，站在你的右邊。

en: Hear, O daughter, and consider, and incline your ear: forget your people and your father's house,
zh: 王所愛的女子啊！你要聽，要看，要留心地聽； 你要忘記你的本族和你的父家；

en: and the king will desire your beauty. Since he is your lord, bow to him.
zh: 王就愛慕你的美麗； 因為他是你的主， 你要向他俯伏。

en: The people of Tyre will seek your favor with gifts, the richest of the people.
zh: 推羅的居民 必帶著禮物而來； 民間富有的人要向你求恩。

en: All glorious is the princess in her chamber, with robes interwoven with gold.
zh: 王所愛的女子在宮裡，極其榮華； 她的衣服全是用金線繡成的。

en: In many-colored robes she is led to the king, with her virgin companions following behind her.
zh: 她身穿刺繡的衣服，被引到王的面前； 她後面伴隨的童女， 也都被帶到你的面前。

en: With joy and gladness they are led along as they enter the palace of the king.
zh: 她們歡喜快樂被引到王那裡； 她們要進入王宮。

en: In place of your fathers shall be your sons; you will make them princes in all the earth.
zh: 你的子孫必接續你的列祖； 你要立他們作全地的王。

en: I will cause your name to be remembered in all generations; therefore nations will praise you forever and ever.
zh: 我必使你的名被萬代記念； 因此萬民都必稱讚你，直到永永遠遠。
